shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: feather particle during preening behavior, visualizes grooming action
context.screen_position: spawns near Echo's body (x=64±10, y=60), drifts sideways
context.usage_scenario: spawns 2-3 times during preening state (5 seconds), drifts left or right, shows Echo is grooming feathers

visual_specification.shape: small irregular pixel, represents tiny feather fragment
visual_specification.texture: solid color, no internal detail at 2x2px

animation.description: spawns near Echo's body, drifts horizontally left or right 8-12px over 1.5 seconds, slight downward arc, fades out, 2-3 feathers spawn during 5-second preening animation

visual_specification.details: orange feather fragment (#FFA300) matching Echo's body, 2x2px, spawns 2-3 times during preening, drifts sideways (left or right randomly) with slight downward curve, disappears after 1.5 seconds, subtle grooming effect

relationships.differences_from: horizontal motion (not upward like other particles), smallest particle (2x2px), spawns intermittently (not continuously), natural grooming behavior visualization

explicit_negations: no more than 3 feathers visible at once
